content.en:
"It's thirteenth on the Heavenly Monarch List, but it's still not enough!"

Ye Tian muttered.

His goal is not to be thirteenth, but to be first.

It's just that his physical body is far from reaching the limit, and there is still a great improvement in the aspect of chaos supernatural powers.

In addition, various secret techniques can also continue to be improved.

In short, he has a lot more to improve.

"There is still a lack of resources, the ninth layer of the Xuanxuan Jue consumes too many resources, if you want to cultivate the Xuanxuan Jue to the Xiaocheng, Dacheng and even the Consummation Realm, those resources need to cost at least tens of millions of points!"

This is not an exaggeration, but a fact.

This is only the consumption of one aspect of the Xuan Xuan Jue, and the consumption of other aspects is not low.

It can be said that at Ye Tian's level, every time he improves his strength, he needs to consume countless resources, and ordinary Heavenly Monarchs can't afford it at all.

......

A big universe, a small world.

An incarnation of the Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch descended here, waiting here silently.

Suddenly.

The space rippled, and Ye Tian's figure appeared.

Yang Long Tianjun saw Ye Tian shuttling in the Great Realm, and he was immediately very envious.

However, he also knew his ability, and he could not meet the cultivation conditions for him to transfer the inheritance to the Great Realm.

"Yang Long, I came to you this time to ask you, where are the treasures in the Great Universe that are rich in resources, I need a lot of resources now, otherwise I can't maintain a fast cultivation!" Ye Tian said directly.

"Master, the birth of the great universe has not been very long, many treasures are in the process of being born, and there are not many precious treasures, it is difficult to find a suitable treasure land, and the treasures that appear at present are basically occupied by major forces, with a powerful Heavenly Monarch sitting in charge and a large array of guards!"

Yanglong Tianjun said.

When Ye Tian heard this, he immediately frowned.

He also knew that it was not easy to obtain a large amount of resources, otherwise, the other Heavenly Monarchs would not all be short of resources.

But he didn't want to cultivate slowly, spending tens of millions or even hundreds of millions of years to cultivate the ninth layer of the Xuanxuan Technique.

"It seems that we must snatch the resource points of other big forces!"

Ye Tian decided.

"Yang Long, you collect information for me, pay attention to concealment, all the forces that are not very good with the Void Heaven lineage, collect all the information of their resources and treasures, and then hand it over to me!" Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes!"

Yanglong Tianjun was taken aback and hurriedly responded.

He knew that Ye Tian probably wanted to do something to those resource treasures, but in this way, once it was discovered, it would be completely troublesome.

Although the great universe is very chaotic now, and there are fights everywhere, there are still no large-scale battles, and the dead are basically weaker Heavenly Monarchs, Divine Generals, and Earth Venerables.

Of course, Ye Tian's order, he didn't dare to disobey.

Wow!

The incarnation of Yang Dragon Heavenly Monarch dissipated, and Ye Tian also cast the Great Realm Shift and left here.

A few years later, Yanglong Tianjun sent a detailed resource, which was information about some precious resources and treasures of the major forces.

These treasures contain a lot of resources, not to mention those resources that have not grown, just the resources that have grown, each treasure land is worth more than 1 million points.

Some treasure land with few resources, Yang Long Tianjun didn't mention it at all, because he knew how huge the resources Ye Tian needed, so he naturally didn't dare to fool Ye Tian with some less important treasure land resources.

"There are more than 100 treasure lands, I didn't expect there to be so many treasure lands rich in resources in the great universe!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

But if you think about it carefully, it's right that the Great Universe is so big, and the Void Heaven Vein is so strong, it only occupies a small area, and it is not worth mentioning at all compared to the entire Great Universe.

With such a huge universe, there are definitely many treasures that have not been discovered in the Void Heaven Vein.

Moreover, Ye Tian didn't know much about the situation of the treasure land of the universe, and what detailed information was, so it was normal not to know.

"According to Yang Long's estimate, there are a total of seven treasure lands worth more than 10 million points, one of which is occupied by the Void Heaven One Vein, and a large number of Heavenly Monarchs are guarding there!"

Ye Tian knew that the treasure land guarded by the Void Heaven One Pulse was called the Ancient Sea Realm, which happened to be near the territory of the Void Heaven Palace, so the Void Heaven Temple spent a huge price to occupy this world treasure land.

The Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, who is now the third on the Heavenly Monarch List, has been guarding the Ancient Sea Realm, and half of the resources of the Ancient Sea Realm are attributed to the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, and some other resources have been shared by many Heavenly Monarchs in the Void Heaven Hall according to a certain proportion.

Ye Tian also had a small share, but the proportion was too small, because when he first captured the Ancient Sea Realm, the Void Heaven Pulse had fought with several big forces, and at that time, Ye Tian was still in retreat and cultivating, and he didn't know at all, so he didn't participate.

Therefore, it is naturally impossible for him to get too much share, otherwise others will inevitably be dissatisfied.

"I can't count on the Ancient Sea Realm, even if my strength is stronger than that of the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch in the future, I am embarrassed to grab the resources of the Moon Swallowing Heavenly Monarch, so I must fight for the resources myself!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Then, his gaze was fixed on the information of the other seven treasure lands.

Soon, he locked on one of the treasures.

Ten Star Sea!

The Sea of Ten Stars is an ocean, an ocean located in the starry sky, surrounded by ten huge stars, which is why the Sea of Ten Stars has such a name.

At the beginning, the Ten Star Sea was not famous, but more than 1 million years ago, the Ten Star Sea was discovered to have a rare resource, Star Sand, which is located at the bottom of the Ten Star Sea.

As a result, the Sea of Ten Stars became a top treasure land.

In the Void Heaven One Vein, one pound of ten-star sand is worth one point, and how many points should a ten-star sea be worth?

10 million points is just a fictitious finger, in fact, it is far more than 10 million points.

However, it is more troublesome to collect the Star Sand, and it is not like collecting ordinary things, and you can easily take it away.

If you can easily take away the Star Sand, then there is no need to collect it slowly, with the strength of a group of Heavenly Monarchs, you can collect the Star Sand of the Ten Star Sea in a short time.

Star Sand looks similar to sand, but it is so special that it cannot be touched directly by hand, and it is difficult to ingest directly with other objects.

Xingchen Sand is hidden in the water, it is difficult for the divine sense to detect, and it is difficult to touch with the hand, and only by using the supernatural powers of the star type can you grasp the Xingchen Sand.

Because of this, it was difficult for the Demon Yin Sect that occupied the Star Sand to collect the Star Sand, and only sent a few Heavenly Monarchs who knew the Star Chaos Divine Power, and some groups of Earth Lords and Divine Generals who knew the Star Sand to slowly collect the Star Sand.

But a god general, even if he knows the great magic power of the stars, it will take tens of thousands of years to collect a catty of star sand, and it is impossible for the god generals not to cultivate!

Therefore, the Demon Sound Sect occupied the Ten Star Seas for more than a million years, and it did not collect many Star Sands.

Therefore, the Sea of Ten Stars definitely contains a large amount of Star Sand.

In addition, due to the characteristics of the Star Sand, the Demon Yin Sect's monitoring of the Ten Star Seas was not very strict, after all, the Demon Yin Sect felt that even if other Heavenly Monarchs wanted to steal the Star Sand, it would take a long time.

Stealing for such a long time, the Demon Sound Sect was easy to discover, and there was no need to monitor the Ten Star Sea all the time.

"Just choose the Ten Star Sea of the Demon Sound Sect, it's too suitable for me!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.
